name: yakou-lang
description: Language support for Yakou via yakou-ls (diagnostics, future completions).

yakou.javaPath.description: Java executable used to run yakou-ls (must be on PATH or an absolute path).

yakou.languageServerJar.description: Path to yakou-ls.jar. If empty, uses YAKOU_LS_JAR or, when developing this repo, language-server/target/yakou-ls.jar relative to the repo root.

yakou.sourceRoot.description: Optional Yakou source root for implicit packages (passed to the server as initializationOptions.sourceRoot). ${workspaceFolder} is expanded.

yakou.classpath.description: Classpath entries for Java interop typechecking (initializationOptions.classpath). ${workspaceFolder} is expanded in each entry.
